title: Regarding - Security Director Arthur Ford
body:
The Nullmen took to the void-fermented melon juice pretty quickly, the effects are interesting. We’ll keep making sure to keep import routes open but I’m not sure how long we can keep it under the radar.

Your boss is absolutely aware and hasn’t made any attempts to shut us down… he is on our side here. I will have to reach out at some point or maybe you should call him?

The main thing that has me concerned are the Nulls in the time tower constructing a Void Gate, talk about following the white rabbit… All of MythOS will be blown wide open if they succeed, but that could be cool.

I’ll keep as many back doors open as I can but whoever started it is hopefully going to continue as well.

- GS
‎
